back_translation: And David spoke to the LORD the words of this song, on the day the LORD delivered him from the hand of all his enemies and from the hand of Saul.
And he said: 'The LORD is my rock and my fortress and my deliverer to me.'
My God is my rock, in whom I take refuge — my shield and the horn of my salvation, my stronghold and my refuge, my Savior — You save me from violence.
I will call upon the LORD, who is worthy to be praised; and from my enemies I will be saved.
For the waves of death surrounded me; the torrents of chaos terrified me.
The cords of Sheol surrounded me; the snares of death confronted me.
In my distress I called upon the LORD, and to my God I cried out. And He heard from His temple my voice, and my cry for help was in His ears.
Then the earth shook and trembled; the foundations of the heavens quaked, and they shook, because He burned with anger.
Smoke went up from His nostrils, and fire from His mouth consumed; coals blazed from Him.
And He bowed the heavens and came down; and dark clouds were beneath His feet.
And He rode upon a cherub and flew; and He appeared upon the wings of the wind.
And He made darkness around Him a canopy — a gathering of water, thick clouds of the skies.
From the brightness before Him, coals of fire blazed.
The LORD thundered from the heavens, and the Most High gave His voice.
And He sent arrows and scattered them — lightning, and routed them.
And the channels of the sea appeared; the foundations of the world were uncovered, at the rebuke of the LORD, from the breath of the wind of His nostrils.
He sent from on high, He took me; He drew me out from many waters.
He rescued me from my strong enemy, from those who hated me, for they were stronger than I.
They confronted me in the day of my calamity, but the LORD was my support.
And He brought me out to a broad place; He rescued me, because He delighted in me.
The LORD has rewarded me according to my righteousness; according to the cleanness of my hands He has repaid me.
For I have kept the ways of the LORD, and have not done wickedly from my God.
For all His ordinances are before me, and His statutes — I have not turned away from it.
And I have been blameless before Him, and I kept myself from my iniquity.
And the LORD has repaid me according to my righteousness, according to my cleanness before His eyes.
With the faithful You show Yourself faithful; with the blameless mighty one You show Yourself blameless.
With the pure You show Yourself pure, and with the crooked You show Yourself shrewd.
And an afflicted people You will save; and Your eyes are upon the haughty, You bring them down.
For You are my lamp, O LORD; and the LORD lights up my darkness.
For in You I can run against an army; with my God I can leap a wall.
As for God — His way is perfect; the word of the LORD is refined; He is a shield to all who take refuge in Him.
For who is God besides the LORD? And who is a Rock besides our God?
God is my strong fortress, and He makes my way perfect.
He makes my feet like deer, and He stations me upon my high places.
He trains my hands for battle, and my arms bend a bow of bronze.
And You have given me Your shield of salvation, and Your gentleness has made me great.
You broaden my step under me, and my ankles have not slipped.
I will pursue my enemies and destroy them; and I will not return until I have consumed them.
And I consumed them and crushed them, and they did not rise; and they fell under my feet.
And You armed me with strength for battle; You subdued those who rose against me beneath me.
And my enemies — You have given to me the neck; those who hate me, and I destroyed them.
They looked, but there was no savior; to the LORD, but He did not answer them.
And I beat them as the dust of the earth; like the mud of the streets I crushed them, I trampled them.
And You rescued me from the strivings of my people; You preserved me as the head of nations; a people I had not known will serve me.
Sons of a foreign land will yield to me; at the hearing of the ear they will obey me.
Sons of a foreign land will lose heart, and they will come trembling from their strongholds.
The LORD lives, and blessed be my Rock! And may God, the Rock of my salvation, be exalted.
The God who gives vengeance to me, and who brings down peoples beneath me.
And who brings me out from my enemies; and from those who rise against me You lift me up; from the man of violence You rescue me.
Therefore I will praise You, O LORD, among the nations; and to Your name I will sing praises.
A tower of salvations is He for His king; and He shows steadfast love to His anointed, to David and to his offspring forever.
